037640217","book_info":{"abstract":"狼牙刀锋，丛林战神，铁血柔情，谁与争锋。
败，也要对手肢残体裂。胜，就要傲气冲天！
看一个新兵蛋子的兵王传奇，为战友报仇，为知己义无反顾，为国家抛洒热血，
一把飞刀，一把钢枪，一身好功夫，一腔热血，一段奇遇，看新兵蛋子王峰怎样从一个新兵一步一步的成长为众人仰慕的兵王，如何成为站在世界最高峰的兵王。
新兵连的遭遇，集训队的苦练，任务中的磨练，知己的患难与共，真挚的战友之情，他们是热血的战友兄弟，他们更是敌人眼中冷血而令人恐怖的狼牙特战队。
王峰经过一个一个的磨练，终于成长成为狼牙特战队成员，对手在他的眼中颤抖，在他的脚下惨叫。
狼牙特战队令国人骄傲，另对手恐怖，最终王峰带领狼牙特战队站在了世界的最顶峰。成就了一代兵王传奇。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/72cee66575889d1e1867e03db4a8ed93","author":"钟表","author_id":"","book_id":"7379624562037640217","book_name":"狼牙特战队","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":27,"name":"战神赘婿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27&name=战神赘婿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7380738280951647256","read_count":"17539","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"935710"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"451","tags":"战神赘婿,都市,特种兵","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e9c1a025127eb534fd5e51117a49068c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779178231&x-signature=f%2Fi8vLAMY6FCwsxWg69yxgtcG8o%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"362"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201610312D52F0E279BC2704CDE9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读24小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":86670,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3460},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7424538903347331902","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一部描述軍事提材的特种部队，为了国家的安全，与贩毒分子的殊死博汁，出生入死，不固自已的安危，好书，值得一看。[赞][赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728664986,"group_id":"7379624562037640217","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7DgBula/pFcr3HGlc8Bsdk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"677729749700855","user_name":"喜欢秋花生的仲財"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"677729749700855","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7379624562037640217","book_info":{"abstract":"狼牙刀锋，丛林战神，铁血柔情，谁与争锋。
